Yeah I’ve seen it so often past few days. Same with the AAII sentiment. But uninvested cash doesn’t show fear or a bearish sentiment at all. Since surveys lie, you just gotta watch PA and wait for meaningful bounces instead of trying to call bottom or tops.

comment.body: Absolutely - he could still be wrong, and i expect we're very close to a face-ripping bounce. I will say though (and i mentioned this a few days ago), market character has changed. These moves over the last few days have not been entirely predictable based on option/hedging flows alone. Real-money selling has been coming in i.e. the long-term players that actually own underlying assets have been selling.
